issues.title: Double tasks generated for Loan Simple leads across multiple workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were receiving duplicate tasks in the pre-referral and post-referral workflows. The issue was traced to a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. HubSpot support was engaged and the glitch was resolved.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received double tasks during the impact window and manually close or delete the duplicate tasks.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: Home advisors continued receiving post-referral workflow check-in tasks for deals that had been marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow lacked the correct exit filters for these deal stages. Madelaine Davis updated the workflow filters to suppress tasks for those statuses.
issues.workaround: Manually complete or delete any stray check-in tasks that were generated after a deal was marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow did not re-trigger after deal stage flipped back and forth
issues.desc: When a deal was moved to Offer Accepted, then back to Referred Active or Committed, and then returned to Offer Accepted, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger on the second Offer Accepted transition. The root cause was that 'deal stage = Offer Accepted' was not listed as a re-enrollment criterion in the workflow. Madelaine Davis added it as a re-enrollment trigger.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that were moved to Offer Accepted a second time during the impact window and did not receive TC tasks.

issues.title: Automated emails showing previous loan officer after LO reassignment
issues.desc: When a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails sent to agents continued to display the previous LO's information rather than the updated one. The issue affected at least one deal where Julie Yocum replaced Paul as the assigned LO. Luis investigated and resolved the issue on the product/backend side.
issues.workaround: For any deals where the LO was changed during the impact window, manually send a corrected email to the agent with the updated loan officer information.

issues.title: TC workflow tasks not triggering for MRC deals marked Offer Accepted
issues.desc: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted were not enrolling into the TC workflow, resulting in TCs not receiving their expected tasks. The issue was reported across multiple MRC deals and HubSpot support was engaged. Madelaine Davis confirmed the issue was fixed after speaking with HubSpot support.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals that were marked Offer Accepted during the impact window and did not generate TC tasks.

issues.title: Pre-referral workflow SMS sent outside of approved sending hours
issues.desc: A new lead on the Pre-Referral Workflow received an SMS at 8:10 PM CST, outside the intended sending window. Investigation revealed some older workflows had sending hours set to 8:30 AM, and the Twilio integration was not constraining hours by time zone. A fix was identified on the Twilio end to address sending hour restrictions.
issues.workaround: No retroactive action needed for leads who received off-hours SMS; monitor for recurrence and report any further out-of-window messages.

issues.title: Request filed 2026-04-07 confirmed resolved
issues.desc: A workflow issue was filed via the request tracker on April 7, 2026 and was confirmed resolved on April 30, 2026. The specific nature of the issue was not described in the Slack thread beyond the filed request link.
issues.workaround: Review the original request record for any affected leads and manually enroll or follow up as appropriate.

issues.title: Request filed 2026-04-20 confirmed resolved
issues.desc: A workflow issue was filed via the request tracker on April 20, 2026 and was confirmed resolved on April 30, 2026. The specific nature of the issue was not described in the Slack thread beyond the filed request link.
issues.workaround: Review the original request record for any affected leads and manually enroll or follow up as appropriate.
